name: Chocolate Kiss Thumbprint
recipeIngredient: 1 ounce square unsweetened chocolate, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 30 Minutes Bake Time: 8 Minutes
1. Set oven temperature to 350°F.
2. Grease baking sheet with Butter Flavor Crisco.
3. In a large bowl, combine Crisco, sugar, milk, vanilla, and egg yolk. Beat at medium speed of electric mixer until well blended. Add melted chocolate. Mix well.
4. In another bowl, combine flour and salt. Add to chocolate mixture. Mix until well blended. Form dough into 1-inch balls.
5. Beat egg white slightly with a fork. Coat each ball with egg white. Roll in chopped nuts. Place cookies on baking sheet about 2 inches apart.
6. Press thumb gently into center of each cookie.
7. Bake at 350°F for 7 minutes. Remove from oven and place chocolate kiss in each thumbprint. Return to oven for an additional minute. Remove to a cooling rack.
Makes 2 1/2 dozen cookies.
